name: Pengana International Equities Limited
analysis: PIA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.2600, stop A$1.2128, target A$1.4017 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
